mapper.sql: select issue_id, year_id, year, period, issue_name, publish_date, status, publish_time, article_count, page_count, cover_image, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from publisher_issue
mapper.update: update publisher_issue set status = #{status}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where issue_id = #{issueId}
mapper.delete:
delete from publisher_issue where issue_id in
#{issueId}
